title: 园区网络全流量采集与分析系统
probe_method: codex-desktop-node-repl Chrome extension bridge target probe plus raw screenshot/CDP capability probes

wrapper_probe.desktop_chrome_list_tabs: initially passed in this continuation, then timed out after the CDP device-metrics probe
wrapper_probe.desktop_chrome_open_url: passed for http://10.0.5.8:30180/login before the CDP device-metrics probe
wrapper_probe.acceptance_effect: the Chrome extension target is visible and can open pages before CDP experimentation, but the tab-control path is not stable enough for automated capture sequencing after the failed viewport-control probe

cdp_probe.browser_get_version: not retried in r3; previous run reported unsupported through raw CDP
cdp_probe.emulation_capture_result: timed out; subsequent tab.playwright.evaluate, user.openTabs, and tabs.list also timed out
cdp_probe.clip_screenshot_result: not retried in r3 after tab-control timeout
cdp_probe.acceptance_effect: CDP is discoverable and may be the correct route for viewport control, but the current Desktop Chrome control session became unstable before it could prove a browser-generated 1920x1080 screenshot

acceptance_effect: Current Desktop Chrome bridge can expose the Chrome extension target, open /login, and capture a real page before viewport-control experimentation. However, the only discovered viewport-control path is CDP, and the r3 CDP device metrics probe left tab control timing out. The 1:1 visual gate remains blocked until Desktop Chrome can reliably produce browser-generated 1920x1080 screenshots with receiver capture-meta.json proving uploaded/stored size and browser viewport.
